mainEntity.name: How long does it take to build my website?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most websites take between 2–3 weeks to complete after approval of the demo and design. Smaller websites may be completed sooner depending on the project scope.

mainEntity.name: Do I own the website once it's built?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Once final payment is completed, full ownership of the website is transferred to you.
A free website demo is provided before any commitment. Final pricing depends on the features, functionality, and scope of the project.

mainEntity.name: Do you work with businesses outside New Zealand?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Local Site Growth works with businesses in New Zealand and international clients remotely.
